description: Date of the recorded sales observation
Day of the week the record occurred (numeric encoding)
Whether the date falls on a weekend (1 = yes 0 = no)
Whether the date is a holiday (1 = yes 0 = no)
Amount spent on marketing for that period in dollars
Whether a promotion was active (1 = yes 0 = no)
Selling price of the product for that period in dollars
Competitor's price for a comparable product in dollars
Number of customers who visited the store
Total sales revenue for that period in dollars (target variable)
